objects.name: Objective_Text
objects.string: Get up HERE! figure it out

content.text: Get up HERE! figure it out

events.comment: Check the Input Direction for frame
Retain Excess "Bounce" if dashing into floor
Lerp Towards terminal walking velocity for simplicity
Apply Drag unless player is inputting in direction of takeoff
Double Drag if player is inputting opposite direction
The extra maths is for normalised vectors (Dash will be same speed no matter which direction you dash)
Also it checks the direction, if dashing in direction of movement : add, else : overwrite
Flip, fix upside down rotation, work with facing left/right

parameters:
"Input: " + Player.input.Vector.X + "," + Player.input.Vector.Y + NewLine() + 
"Speed: " + Player.customSpeed.X + NewLine() +
"Speed: " + Player.customSpeed.Y + NewLine() +
"Dash: " + Player.Dash + NewLine()
